title: Senior Investment Banker at State Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at State Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
